databases.name: SQL_Inventory_Product
databases.query: SELECT Product_ID FROM Product WHERE Product_Name = 'Webcam HD';

databases.name: Postgres_Order_Items
databases.query: SELECT DISTINCT order_id FROM order_items WHERE product_id = {{SQL_Inventory_Product.Product_ID}};

databases.name: Postgres_Orders_Filtered
databases.query: SELECT customer_id, SUM(order_amount) AS total_amount FROM "Order" WHERE order_id IN ({{Postgres_Order_Items.order_id}}) GROUP BY customer_id;
